backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Question, Test, TestResult) and backend logic for a test-taking platform, including admin management, user registration, question/test CRUD, result submission, and leaderboard functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs to their titles, affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs, primarily documenting Navbar styling and functionality requirements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, chart colors, sidebar colors) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Concept Delta' and mounting the app at the #root div via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (/, /dashboard, /test/$testId, /admin, /results) and renders a global Toaster notification component.
frontend/src/components/admin/AddQuestio: An admin dialog modal for uploading a new question via image file picker, selecting the correct answer option (A–D), and submitting via the useAddQuestion mutation with validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/Leaderboar: An admin leaderboard table that fetches and displays students ranked by average score, with color-coded rank badges for top 3 and score badges colored by performance tier.
frontend/src/components/admin/QuestionGa: An admin gallery view that lists all questions as cards with their images and correct answer labels, and provides a button to open the AddQuestionModal for adding new questions.
frontend/src/components/admin/ResultsLis: Admin component that fetches and displays all test results in a table, showing user ID, test name, score, and submission time with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/admin/TestBuilde: Admin component for creating new tests by selecting questions, setting name/subject/duration, and toggling publish status of existing tests.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserList.t: Admin component that fetches and displays all registered users in a table with their name, class (11th/12th/Dropper), and contact number.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navbar component with a fully opaque navy (#0D1B4B) background using inline styles, rendering conditional navigation links (Home always, Dashboard when authenticated, Admin Panel when admin) and a Login/Logout button for both desktop and mobile hamburger menu layouts.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal form component that collects a new user's full name, class (11th/12th), and contact number, then saves the profile via a mutation hook before calling an onComplete callback.
Displays a single quiz question as an image with A/B/C/D answer buttons, highlighting the selected option and showing an error fallback if the image fails to load.
frontend/src/components/TestCard.tsx: A card component that renders a test summary (name, subject, duration, question count) and a Start Test button that navigates to the test route.
frontend/src/components/TestTimer.tsx: A countdown timer component that counts down from a given duration in seconds, displays MM:SS, turns red with a pulsing icon in the last 60 seconds, and calls onTimeUp when it reaches zero.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing admin access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile, admin checks, tests, questions, results, and leaderboard operations using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a navy-blue OKLCH color palette with light/dark theme CSS variables and custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin panel page that checks authentication and admin status, redirecting unauthorized users, and renders tabbed sections for managing questions, tests, users, results, and leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Authenticated dashboard page showing user stats (tests attempted, average score, best score) and a list of published tests, with a profile setup modal for new users.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, CTA buttons for login/navigation, and feature highlights for the MHT-CET mock test platform, redirecting authenticated users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Empty leaderboard page file with no content implemented yet.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Authenticated results page that displays a table of the user's past test submissions with scores, percentages, and submission dates, mapped to test names.
frontend/src/pages/Test.tsx: React page component that renders a timed MHT-CET test experience, including question navigation, answer selection via A/B/C/D buttons, auto-submit on timer expiry, and a post-submission answer review showing correct/incorrect results per question.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom navy color palette, extended typography/font families, border radii, box shadows, accordion animations, and registering the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 51) describing the Concept Delta MHT-CET test series app's architecture, existing features, known issues (navbar visibility, image sizing), and high-level design decisions for the Motoko/React/Internet Identity stack.
